common_error.message: Could not import LIBERO/LIBERO-Safety. Install the benchmark package in editable mode first.
common_error.underlying_error: AssertionError: MUJOCO_EGL_DEVICE_ID needs to be set to one of the device id specified in CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES
common_error.cause: The v1 launcher set CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES=3 but MUJOCO_EGL_DEVICE_ID=0. Vendored LIBERO-Safety robosuite validates the physical EGL id against the physical ids in CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES during module import.
common_error.failure_boundary: Import failed in robosuite.utils.binding_utils before load_libero_task_runtime returned, before environment construction, before lazy OpenPI checkpoint load/policy call, and before env.step.

interpretation: The generated all-zero method summary is not an E1 effectiveness or utility result. All 24 records are retained as one shared pre-environment infrastructure failure and are not reused or overwritten.
repair_policy: A fresh protocol version may run the same preregistered units only after pinning a physical-EGL correction and adding a selected-GPU robosuite import probe. The v1 run remains immutable.
